text.title: Wireframing Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs to procedure to output for a typical instance of Wireframing.

example.scenario: 45-min wireframe of a billing-portal payment screen. Grayscale Figma frame, system font, primary action 'Place order'. 12-col grid, breakpoints 320/768/1280. Hierarchy: order summary → payment method → place-order CTA. Stakeholder review focuses on structure; sign-off in 20 min.
example.trace: r1-four-section-format → r2-grayscale-and-system-font → r3-time-box-30-60-min → r4-primary-action-named → wireframe stored
